name: PAY_ALL_PAYROLL_ACTIONS_V
query: SELECT 'PERM' ACTION_STORAGE, PAYROLL_ACTION_ID, ACTION_STATUS, ACTION_TYPE, LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, ENTERPRISE_ID, LEGISLATION_CODE, ACTION_POPULATION_STATUS, CURRENT_CHUNK_NUMBER, DISPLAY_RUN_NUMBER, PAY_REQUEST_ID, ACTION_SEQUENCE, ACTION_PARAMETER_GROUP_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, EFFECTIVE_DATE, PAYROLL_ID, CONSOLIDATION_SET_ID, ELEMENT_SET_ID, DATE_EARNED, RUN_TYPE_ID, ASSIGNMENT_SET_ID, PAYMENT_TYPE_ID, EARN_TIME_PERIOD_ID, DEDN_TIME_PERIOD_ID, BATCH_PROCESS_MODE, LEGISLATIVE_PARAMETERS, RETRO_DEFINITION_ID, FUTURE_PROCESS_MODE, COSTING_PROCESS_MODE, TARGET_PAYROLL_ACTION_ID, CREATOR_ID, CREATOR_TYPE, CURRENT_TASK, ORG_PAYMENT_METHOD_ID, PARENT_ORG_PAY_METHOD_ID, START_CHEQUE_NUMBER, END_CHEQUE_NUMBER, OVERRIDING_DD_DATE, REPORT_CATEGORY_ID, CHEQUE_PROCEDURE, REPORT_FORMAT_MAPPING_ID, EFT_FILE_REFERENCE, EFT_EXPIRY_DATE, BIP_JOB_ID, INTERFACE_TYPE_ID, PAYMENT_REASON, FILE_NAME, PARAMETER1, PARAMETER2, PARAMETER3, PARAMETER4, PARAMETER5, PROCESS_EVENT_ID, EVENT_ACTION_ID, PAY_PAYEE_TYPE, EXPEDITE_FLAG, EXPIRE_ID, PROCESS_PHASE, OVERRIDE_DATE, OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CURRENT_CHUNK_NUMBER, null, PAY_REQUEST_ID, ACTION_SEQUENCE, ACTION_PARAMETER_GROUP_ID, START_DATE, END_DATE, EFFECTIVE_DATE, PAYROLL_ID, CONSOLIDATION_SET_ID, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, LEGISLATIVE_PARAMETERS, null, null, null, TARGET_PAYROLL_ACTION_ID, null, null, CURRENT_TASK, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, null, PARAMETER1, PARAMETER2, PARAMETER3, PARAMETER4, PARAMETER5, PROCESS_EVENT_ID, EVENT_ACTION_ID, null, null, null, null, null, OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CREATION_DATE, LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, LAST_UPDATED_BY, CREATED_BY FROM pay_temp_payroll_actions
